0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7467024810878518041","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书无疑是一部引人入胜的佳作，作者以其精湛的笔触和深刻的思想，构建了一个令人难以忘怀的世界。故事情节紧凑且充满悬念，每一个转折都让人欲罢不能。人物形象鲜明立体，他们的情感和成长轨迹深深打动了读者的心。无论是细腻的情感描写，还是宏大的背景设定，都展现了作者卓越的叙事能力。阅读这本书，不仅是一次心灵的洗礼，更是一场思想的盛宴。强烈推荐给所有热爱阅读"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1738556617,"group_id":"7349664065163103294","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"...","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+adQQ0kjJ+uVIM1NwrnOrOBaPaJS6o3LnroyL0g0nr7","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/913bd8069fe241e9b01f1044ea98decc~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793407&x-signature=UklKx6JIUlw0kfnnzKYkSir8yyQ%3D","user_id":"1737693195155199","user_name":"不会魔法的奇迹师"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1737693195155199","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7349664065163103294","book_info":{"abstract":"前期散播诡秘力量，中期入侵其他世界，后期还没写到。
